description: Canonical consensus test vectors for AXIOM protocol conformance. Any correct implementation of Core must produce the expected outputs for the given inputs. Vectors are deterministic from fixed seeds. Regenerate with: cargo run -p axiom-core-logic --example generate_vectors

vectors.description: CL1: determinism pin — same input same output
vectors.notes: Determinism pin — same input must always produce same state_id. If this diverges from CL1_ACCEPT_001, a consensus-breaking change was introduced.

vectors.description: CL1: missing prev_receipts on non-genesis TX
vectors.notes: wallet_seq=2 implies prior TX exists but no prev_receipts provided

vectors.description: CL5: valid FACT chain with 3 Dilithium witnesses
vectors.notes: FACT chain verification exercised in CL5 with real Dilithium signatures

vectors.description: CL5: broken FACT chain state_id rejected
vectors.notes: FactLink new_state_id set to zeros — state chain discontinuity

vectors.description: CL5: scarred FACT link accepted (receiver consented)
vectors.notes: Scarred links permitted in CL5 — receiver consented via scar-passcode

vectors.description: CL11: valid election — 15 seats resolved, chain hash correct
vectors.notes: CL11: valid election — 15 seats resolved from 15 nominations, chain hash correct. IPC codec pending — from_file test skips CL11.

vectors.description: CL11: seat mismatch — resolved set differs from new_cert.seats
vectors.notes: CL11: seat mismatch — resolved set differs from new_cert.seats. IPC codec pending — from_file test skips CL11.

vectors.description: Oracle TX rejected — witness VBC is 17_281 ticks old (1 tick beyond 24h limit). Reference only — IPC CBOR cannot round-trip oracle_claim.
Oracle TX — witness VBC at 24h boundary. Not rejected for VBC age. Reference only — IPC CBOR cannot round-trip oracle_claim.
vectors.notes: YPX-012 §2.5 Defense 5. Age 17_280 == limit — boundary inclusive. Rejection (if any) is NOT OracleVBCTooOld.
